auth.loginDescription:
Sign in with your Google account
and start taking timeline memos
auth.loginPageFeature1Desc: Leave timestamp memos on key moments while watching YouTube lectures or game walkthroughs. Click any timestamp to jump to that exact moment instantly.
auth.loginPageFeature2Desc: Group related videos into collections by topic for structured management. Create separate collections for React courses, game guides, language learning, and more.
auth.loginPageFeature3Desc: Generate a share link so anyone can view your timeline memos without signing in. Perfect for sharing with study groups or friends.

landing.title: YouTube Timeline Memo
landing.description: Take notes on key moments in YouTube lectures & game walkthroughs and <highlight>jump back with one click</highlight>

timeline.title: Timeline Memos
timeline.desc: Save memos at the current playback time and instantly jump to that moment with a single click

collection.title: Collections
collection.desc: Organize videos by topic or series like "React Course" or "Game Guides" for easy management

share.title: Share Links
share.desc: Generate a share link so anyone can view your timeline memos without signing in

guest.title: Guest Mode
guest.desc: Try it instantly without signing up. Connect your Google account later to keep all your memos

howToUse.step1Desc: Paste the URL of any YouTube lecture or game walkthrough and the title and thumbnail are fetched automatically. You can also search YouTube directly within the app.
howToUse.step2Desc: When an important moment comes up during playback, click 'Capture Current Time'. The timestamp is recorded automatically and you can type your memo right away.
howToUse.step3Title: Jump to Any Moment with One Click
howToUse.step3Desc: Click any saved timestamp memo to jump directly to that point in the video. No more scrubbing from the beginning when reviewing lectures or checking a walkthrough.
howToUse.step4Desc: Group related videos into collections by topic for easy management. Generate a share link so anyone can view your timeline memos without needing to sign in.

useCases.case1Desc: Save timestamps for key concept explanations, code examples, and exam-relevant moments so you can jump straight to them during review — no need to rewatch the entire video.
useCases.case2Desc: Bookmark boss strategies, hidden item locations, and quest hints so you can check them in an instant during gameplay without scrubbing through long walkthrough videos.
useCases.case3Desc: Mark timestamps for native expressions, pronunciation tips, and grammar explanations. Jump to shadowing practice segments instantly during repeat study sessions.
useCases.case4Desc: Note directing techniques, editing points, and reference scenes from videos you admire. Share timestamps with teammates via a share link for collaborative feedback.

faq.a1: Yes, YouTube Timeline Memo is completely free. Sign in with Google or start as a guest immediately — all features including timeline memos, collections, and share links are available with no restrictions.
faq.q2: Can I use it without signing in?
faq.a2: Yes, you can try everything in Guest Mode without creating an account. When you connect your Google account later, all your guest memos are transferred automatically so nothing is lost.
faq.a3: All memos are stored securely on Google Firebase cloud servers. Once signed in with your Google account, you can access the same memos from any device — PC, smartphone, or tablet.
faq.q4: What can someone see with a share link?
faq.a4: Anyone with a share link can view the YouTube video along with all its saved timestamp memos without signing in. They can also click timestamps to jump to those moments. You can disable the share link at any time.
faq.a5: Yes, it works on smartphones and tablets in any modern web browser. No app installation required — just open the site and start using it.
faq.q6: Can I add any YouTube video?
faq.a6: Any publicly available YouTube video can be added by pasting its URL. You can also use the built-in YouTube search to find and add videos directly from within the app.

landing.ctaDesc: Try it instantly as a guest or sign in with Google to get started.

memoList.noMemos:
No memos yet.
Play the video and capture a timestamp to add a memo.

memoEdit.subtitle: Editing Memos — {count}
memoEdit.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this memo?

shareDialog.title: Share Link
shareDialog.shareInfo: Anyone with this link can view the timeline memos for this video.
shareDialog.createInfo: Generate a share link so anyone can view the timeline memos for this video.

collections.title: Collections
collections.confirmDeleteDesc: Delete this collection? Videos inside will not be deleted.

collectionDetail.noVideosInCollection: No videos yet. Add some from below.

notFound.detail: The address is invalid or the page has been deleted.

kakaoGuard.title: Please open in Safari
kakaoGuard.description:
Google login is not supported
in the KakaoTalk in-app browser.
Copy the URL and open it in Safari.
